nasb.text: Moses was not able to enter the tent of meeting because the cloud had settled on it, and the glory of the Lord filled the tabernacle.

esv.text: And Moses was not able to enter the tent of meeting because the cloud settled on it, and the glory of the Lord filled the tabernacle.

cnv.text: 摩西不能進入會幕，因為雲彩停在會幕上面，並且耶和華的榮耀充滿著帳幕。

ccb.text: 摩西不能进会幕，因为云彩停在上面，耶和华的荣光充满了圣幕。
